medical_history.chief_complaint: Watery diarrhea 10 times/day, lower abdominal pain during defecation
medical_history.history_of_present_illness: Onset of loose stools 1-2 times/day around March 14, progressing to watery diarrhea 10 times/day with lower abdominal pain from March 17. Temporary improvement to mushy stools 2-3 times/day on March 20, but worsened again to watery stools 2-5 times/day from March 21.
medical_history.social_history: Travel history to Thailand and Cambodia from February 28 to March 12.
